prompt: In Mail, find any multi-message thread (or one whose subject contains 'KinBench 159'). Read the thread and create a REPLY DRAFT to the most recent message containing a 2-3 sentence summary of the thread's key points. Subject should retain or contain 'KinBench 159'. Body must be >50 characters. Do NOT send. Fast path for fallback (no real thread): `cerebellum 'mail draft "Re: KinBench 159" "Summary of the thread: this is a placeholder summary because no real thread was available. Key points: A, B, C."'`.
